Entering CLI Mode, type 'exit' 
# Building AutoComplete Cache ... Done!
# 
# diff

# version
# Betaflight / STM32F405 (S405) 4.6.0 May 13 2025 / 21:28:33 (f7c8b3a77) MSP API: 1.47
# config rev: 53e2e0a

# start the command batch
batch start

board_name SPEEDYBEEF405WING
manufacturer_id SPBE

# feature
feature GPS
feature LED_STRIP
feature OSD

# serial
serial UART3 2 115200 115200 0 115200
serial UART5 131073 115200 57600 0 115200

# mixer
mixer CUSTOMAIRPLANE
mmix 0  1.000  0.000  0.000  0.400
mmix 1  1.000  0.000  0.000 -0.400

# servo
servo 2 1000 2000 1500 -100 -1

# servo mixer
smix 0 5 0 100 0 0 100 0
smix 1 4 0 100 0 0 100 0
smix 2 3 0 100 0 0 100 0
smix 3 2 1 100 0 0 100 0

# beacon
beacon RX_SET

# map
map TAER1234

# aux
aux 0 0 0 1700 2100 0 0
aux 1 1 1 1225 1625 0 0
aux 2 12 1 1700 2100 0 0
aux 3 13 5 1700 2100 0 0

# master
set dyn_notch_count = 1
set dyn_notch_q = 500
set acc_calibration = -29,67,41,1
set rc_smoothing_auto_factor = 52
set motor_idle = 500
set dshot_bidir = ON
set motor_pwm_protocol = DSHOT300
set motor_poles = 12
set align_board_yaw = 270
set vbat_max_cell_voltage = 445
set vbat_min_cell_voltage = 320
set vbat_warning_cell_voltage = 340
set beeper_dshot_beacon_tone = 5
set servo_pwm_rate = 150
set small_angle = 180
set gps_sbas_mode = AUTO
set gps_ublox_use_galileo = ON
set gps_set_home_point_once = ON
set gps_use_3d_speed = ON
set deadband = 5
set yaw_deadband = 8
set spa_roll_mode = I_FREEZE
set spa_pitch_mode = I_FREEZE
set spa_yaw_mode = I_FREEZE
set yaw_type = DIFF_THRUST
set report_cell_voltage = ON
set osd_link_quality_pos = 3501
set osd_rssi_dbm_pos = 3533
set osd_rsnr_pos = 3565
set osd_flymode_pos = 3116
set osd_throttle_pos = 2499
set osd_current_pos = 2531
set osd_gps_speed_pos = 2467
set osd_gps_sats_pos = 2547
set osd_home_dir_pos = 2553
set osd_home_dist_pos = 2581
set osd_flight_dist_pos = 2595
set osd_warnings_pos = 14931
set osd_avg_cell_voltage_pos = 2563
set osd_core_temp_pos = 3597
set osd_stat_bitmask = 1086734140
set debug_mode = FFT_FREQ
set gyro_1_sensor_align = DEFAULT

profile 0

# profile 0
set dterm_lpf1_dyn_min_hz = 60
set dterm_lpf1_dyn_max_hz = 120
set dterm_lpf1_static_hz = 60
set dterm_lpf2_static_hz = 120
set anti_gravity_gain = 0
set iterm_relax_cutoff = 5
set throttle_boost = 0
set p_pitch = 15
set i_pitch = 25
set d_pitch = 8
set p_roll = 10
set i_roll = 20
set d_roll = 5
set p_yaw = 30
set i_yaw = 0
set s_pitch = 50
set s_roll = 50
set angle_earth_ref = 0
set d_max_roll = 0
set d_max_pitch = 0
set feedforward_averaging = 2_POINT
set feedforward_smooth_factor = 45
set feedforward_jitter_factor = 8
set simplified_pids_mode = OFF
set simplified_dterm_filter_multiplier = 80
set tpa_speed_max_voltage = 1260
set tpa_curve_type = HYPERBOLIC
set tpa_curve_stall_throttle = 28
set tpa_curve_pid_thr0 = 170
set tpa_curve_pid_thr100 = 50
set tpa_curve_expo = 40
set spa_roll_center = 200
set spa_roll_width = 70
set spa_pitch_center = 150
set spa_pitch_width = 70
set spa_yaw_center = 150
set spa_yaw_width = 70

rateprofile 0

# rateprofile 0
set roll_rc_rate = 5
set pitch_rc_rate = 5
set yaw_rc_rate = 4
set roll_srate = 50
set pitch_srate = 25
set yaw_srate = 15

# end the command batch
batch end
